ess-beta-metadata.label: Adult obesity prevalence
ess-beta-metadata.subtitle: Percentage of adults aged 18 and over classified as living with obesity
ess-beta-metadata.sourceOrg: Office for Health Improvement and Disparities
ess-beta-metadata.longDescription: This indicator shows the percentage of adults aged 18 and over classified as living with obesity, in England, for 16/11/2015-15/11/2016 to 16/11/2024-15/11/2025.
ess-beta-metadata.caveats:
Adults are defined as living with obesity if their body mass index (BMI) is greater than or equal to 30kg/m².

Data is based on [Active Lives Adult Survey (ALAS)](https://www.sportengland.org/research-and-data/data/active-lives) from Sport England. The survey provides self-reported height and weight, which can be used to produce BMI estimates. The data collected also allows for adjustments to be applied to the self-reported height and weight measurements at an individual level to give likely actual height and weight. Please see [Indicator Definitions and Supporting Information](https://fingertips.phe.org.uk/profile/obesity-physical-activity-nutrition/data#page/6/gid/1938133368/pat/159/par/K02000001/ati/15/are/E92000001/iid/93881/age/168/sex/4/cat/-1/ctp/-1/yrr/1/cid/4/tbm/1) for further details.
